title: 80 Pieces Wire Clips for Cables,Cable Clips White,Cable Wall Clips,Cable Tacks,Management Holder for Organiser Desk,Wall,Office and Home,Outdoor(8mm)
features: ✔ You will receive 80pcs white steel nail clips with slot diameter of about 8mm,suitable for fixing cables with diameter of about 8mm or total diameter of about 8mm.
✔ MATERIAL:The cable ties are made of PE plastic material with high carbon steel spikes,durable and corrosion resistant and not easy to fall off.

✔ Cable clamps are easy to use,just insert the cable into the gap in the middle of the steel nail and then knock the nail into the wall,not easy to fall off,and the steel nail is not easy to bend,it is very conveniently suitable for fixing long term cables.
✔ Cable clips can easily fix cables to the wall,help you fix and organise all kinds of small cables,improve the safety of electricity,make your home more tidy and save space.

✔ If you still have too many cables in your home and can't tell them apart,you can try this cable clips with steel spikes to help you differentiate the direction of each cable and fix them, such as charging cables,all kinds of power cables,all kinds of cable wires,etc.,suitable for office,home and so on.
description: Product Description Cable fixings The cable ties are made of PE plastic, equipped with high-carbon steel nails, durable, corrosion resistant and not easy to fall off. Cable fixings - The cable tie is easy to use, just insert the cable wire into the gap in the middle of the steel nail and then hammer the steel nail into the wall, it is not easy to fall off, and the steel nail is not easy to elbow, very practical and suitable for attaching durable cable. - Cable ties can easily attach cables to the wall, help you attach and organise various small cables, improve electrical safety, make your home cleaner and save space. - If there are still too many cables at home and you can't tell the difference, you can try this cable tie with steel nails.
